---
title: "Analytic Sample_PartA"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
# Libraries and definitions
library(tidyverse)
library(nhanesA)
library(here)
# 1. Load statutory CDC height-for-age chart
statage <- read.csv("https://www.cdc.gov/growthcharts/data/zscore/statage.csv")
names(statage) <- tolower(names(statage))

# 2. Define Zemel et al. (2011) TBLH Reference Tables
tblh_lms <- read.csv(text = "sex,age_band,L,M,S
1,5,-0.236,0.530,0.083
1,6,-0.278,0.570,0.084
1,7,-0.319,0.613,0.084
1,8,-0.360,0.654,0.085
1,9,-0.402,0.692,0.085
1,10,-0.443,0.728,0.086
1,11,-0.484,0.766,0.086
1,12,-0.526,0.813,0.087
1,13,-0.567,0.871,0.087
1,14,-0.608,0.934,0.088
1,15,-0.650,0.994,0.088
1,16,-0.691,1.042,0.089
1,17,-0.732,1.072,0.089
1,18,-0.774,1.087,0.090
1,19,-0.815,1.093,0.091
2,5,-0.146,0.521,0.082
2,6,-0.010,0.561,0.084
2,7,0.110,0.601,0.086
2,8,0.205,0.640,0.087
2,9,0.270,0.681,0.088
2,10,0.298,0.729,0.089
2,11,0.279,0.784,0.089
2,12,0.201,0.843,0.088
2,13,0.065,0.894,0.086
2,14,-0.110,0.929,0.083
2,15,-0.288,0.948,0.082
2,16,-0.440,0.958,0.080
2,17,-0.560,0.965,0.079
2,18,-0.656,0.969,0.078
2,19,-0.741,0.970,0.077")

tblh_coefs <- read.csv(text = "sex,age_band,intercept,slope
1,5,-0.090,0.704
1,6,-0.071,0.666
1,7,-0.064,0.715
1,8,-0.029,0.744
1,9,-0.027,0.669
1,10,-0.058,0.591
1,11,-0.117,0.591
1,12,-0.128,0.550
1,13,-0.139,0.556
1,14,-0.111,0.553
1,15,-0.032,0.327
1,16,-0.022,0.244
1,17,-0.026,0.236
1,18,-0.047,0.321
1,19,-0.007,0.285
2,5,-0.228,0.879
2,6,-0.094,0.736
2,7,-0.003,0.720
2,8,0.000,0.682
2,9,-0.097,0.622
2,10,-0.188,0.639
2,11,-0.256,0.708
2,12,-0.150,0.620
2,13,-0.081,0.494
2,14,-0.029,0.388
2,15,-0.039,0.371
2,16,-0.045,0.323
2,17,-0.015,0.316
2,18,-0.013,0.355
2,19,-0.007,0.302")

# 3. Helper function for LMS Z-score calculation
lms_z <- function(x, L, M, S) ifelse(L != 0, ((x / M)^L - 1) / (L * S), log(x / M) / S)
```

```{r}
# --- DEMOGRAPHICS (DEMO_H, DEMO_I, DEMO_J) ---
# 1. Fetch individual cycles
demo_h <- nhanes('DEMO_H') %>% 
  select(SEQN, SDMVPSU, SDMVSTRA, WTMEC2YR, RIDAGEYR, RIDEXAGM, RIAGENDR, RIDRETH3, DMDHREDU, INDFMIN2, INDFMPIR)

demo_i <- nhanes('DEMO_I') %>% 
  select(SEQN, SDMVPSU, SDMVSTRA, WTMEC2YR, RIDAGEYR, RIDEXAGM, RIAGENDR, RIDRETH3, DMDHREDU, INDFMIN2, INDFMPIR)

# Cycle J uses DMDHREDZ instead of DMDHREDU -> selecting and renaming
demo_j <- nhanes('DEMO_J') %>% 
  select(SEQN, SDMVPSU, SDMVSTRA, WTMEC2YR, RIDAGEYR, RIDEXAGM, RIAGENDR, RIDRETH3, DMDHREDZ, INDFMIN2, INDFMPIR) %>% 
  rename(DMDHREDU = DMDHREDZ)

# 2. Stack
demo_raw <- bind_rows(demo_h, demo_i, demo_j)
```

```{r}
# --- DEXA / BODY MEASUREMENTS (DXX & BMX) ---
dexa_raw <- bind_rows(
  nhanes('DXX_H') %>% select(SEQN, DXDSTBMD),
  nhanes('DXX_I') %>% select(SEQN, DXDSTBMD),
  nhanes('DXX_J') %>% select(SEQN, DXDSTBMD)
)

bmx_raw <- bind_rows(
  nhanes('BMX_H') %>% select(SEQN, BMXHT),
  nhanes('BMX_I') %>% select(SEQN, BMXHT),
  nhanes('BMX_J') %>% select(SEQN, BMXHT)
)
```

```{r}
# --- PHYSICAL ACTIVITY & SCREEN TIME (PAQ) ---

# Cycles H (2013-14) and I (2015-16)
# All PA and screen time questions are inside PAQ_H and PAQ_I
paq_h <- nhanes('PAQ_H') %>% 
  select(SEQN, PAQ710, PAQ715, PAQ722, PAQ706, PAQ650, PAQ655, PAD660, PAQ665, PAQ670, PAD675)

paq_i <- nhanes('PAQ_I') %>% 
  select(SEQN, PAQ710, PAQ715, PAQ722, PAQ706, PAQ650, PAQ655, PAD660, PAQ665, PAQ670, PAD675)

# Cycle J (2017-18)
# Youth screen time/activity (PAQ710, PAQ715, PAQ722, PAQ706) live in PAQY_J
paq_j_youth <- nhanes('PAQY_J') %>% 
  select(SEQN, PAQ710, PAQ715, PAQ706)

# Adult/Teen recreational activity (PAQ650, PAQ655, PAD660, PAQ665, PAQ670, PAD675) live in PAQ_J
paq_j_general <- nhanes('PAQ_J') %>% 
  select(SEQN, PAQ650, PAQ655, PAD660, PAQ665, PAQ670, PAD675)

# Merge Cycle J youth + general files together by SEQN
paq_j <- full_join(paq_j_youth, paq_j_general, by = "SEQN")

# --- 3. Stack all 3 cycles cleanly ---
paq_raw <- bind_rows(paq_h, paq_i, paq_j)
```

```{r}
# ---FOOD SECURITY (FSQ) ---
fsq_raw <- bind_rows(
  nhanes('FSQ_H') %>% select(SEQN, FSDCH),
  nhanes('FSQ_I') %>% select(SEQN, FSDCH),
  nhanes('FSQ_J') %>% select(SEQN, FSDCH)
)
```

```{r}
## -- MERGE TOGETHER -- ##
master_raw <- demo_raw %>%
  left_join(dexa_raw, by = "SEQN") %>%
  left_join(bmx_raw, by = "SEQN") %>%
  left_join(paq_raw, by = "SEQN") %>%
  left_join(fsq_raw, by = "SEQN")
```

```{r}
# ---step 1. INITIAL FILTERING & SCREEN TIME CLEANING ---
# Preserves all N = 29,400 observations per survey estimation rules
nhanes_clean <- master_raw %>%
  mutate(
    # --- Derived Variables & Weights ---
    WTMEC6YR = WTMEC2YR / 3,
    tv_hours = case_when(
      PAQ710 == 8 ~ 0,
      PAQ710 %in% c(77, 99) ~ NA_real_,
      TRUE ~ as.numeric(PAQ710)
    ),
    comp_hours = case_when(
      PAQ715 == 8 ~ 0,
      PAQ715 %in% c(77, 99) ~ NA_real_,
      TRUE ~ as.numeric(PAQ715)
    ),
    total_screen_time = tv_hours + comp_hours,
    parent_edu = ifelse(DMDHREDU %in% c(7, 9), NA, DMDHREDU),
    age_band = floor(RIDEXAGM / 12)
  )
```

```{r}
# --- Step 2. PHASE 1: PROTOCOL ELIGIBILITY ---
nhanes_clean <- nhanes_clean %>%
  mutate(
    # verifies participant attended a MEC exam (has a valid exam age and a positive MEC weight)
    flag_mec = ifelse(!is.na(RIDEXAGM) & WTMEC2YR > 0, 1, 0),
    
    #verifies age range criteria (8-17 years)
flag_age = ifelse(flag_mec == 1 & RIDAGEYR >= 8 & RIDAGEYR <= 17, 1, 0),
  
  #verifies eligible for dexa (includes valid and invalid results)
flag_dexa_eligible = ifelse(flag_age == 1, 1, 0),
  
  #defines baseline "eligible sample" (ie. steps 1-4 of fig 1 flow diagram)
subpop_eligible = ifelse(flag_dexa_eligible == 1, 1, 0))
```

```{r}
# --- Step 3. PHASE 2: MISSINGNESS EXCLUSIONS ---
nhanes_clean <- nhanes_clean %>%
  mutate(
    # Starts from eligible sample (subpop_eligible == 1) and removes missing/invalid DEXA scans
    flag_valid_dexa = ifelse(subpop_eligible == 1 & !is.na(DXDSTBMD), 1, 0),
    
    # REmoves participants missing standing height data
    flag_valid_height = ifelse(flag_valid_dexa == 1 & !is.na(BMXHT), 1, 0),
    
    # Removes participants missing TV/computer screen time data
    flag_valid_screen = ifelse(flag_valid_dexa == 1 & !is.na(total_screen_time), 1, 0),
    
    # Removes participants missing child food security questionnaire data
    flag_valid_fsq = ifelse(flag_valid_screen == 1 & !is.na(FSDCH), 1, 0),
    
    # Removes participants missing race/ethnicity
    flag_valid_race = ifelse(flag_valid_fsq == 1 & !is.na(RIDRETH3), 1, 0),
    
    # Removes participants missing household poverty level / income ratio
    flag_valid_pir = ifelse(flag_valid_race == 1 & !is.na(INDFMPIR), 1, 0),
    
    # Removes participants missing parent education level
    flag_valid_edu = ifelse(flag_valid_pir == 1 & !is.na(parent_edu), 1, 0),

    # Defines the final group with ZERO missing data across all key study variables
    subpop1= ifelse(flag_valid_edu == 1, 1, 0),
    
    #subpop (DEXA valid only) for REFERENCE
    subpop = ifelse(flag_valid_dexa == 1, 1, 0))
```

```{r}
# --- Step 4. PRINT PHASE 1 COUNTS (ELIGIBILITY) ---
cat("=========================================================\n")
cat("      PHASE 1: PROTOCOL ELIGIBILITY COUNTS              \n")
cat("=========================================================\n")

# Total starting sample across all 3 survey waves
cat("Total NHANES 2013-2018 Combined Sample:    ", nrow(nhanes_clean), "\n\n")

# Exclusions & remaining count for MEC attendance
cat("Excluded: Did not attend MEC exam:        -", sum(nhanes_clean$flag_mec == 0), "\n")
cat("  Attended MEC Exam:                       ", sum(nhanes_clean$flag_mec == 1), "\n\n")

# Exclusions & remaining count for Age 8-17 (checked among MEC attendees)
cat("Excluded: Outside age range 8–17 years:   -", sum(nhanes_clean$flag_mec == 1 & nhanes_clean$flag_age == 0), "\n")
cat("  Aged 8–17 years:                         ", sum(nhanes_clean$flag_age == 1), "\n\n")

# Exclusions & final count for DEXA protocol eligibility
cat("Excluded: Ineligible for DEXA protocol:   -", sum(nhanes_clean$flag_age == 1 & nhanes_clean$flag_dexa_eligible == 0), "\n")
cat("---------------------------------------------------------\n")

# Total target eligible subpopulation (Step 2 output)
cat("TARGET ELIGIBLE SAMPLE (subpop_eligible):  ", sum(nhanes_clean$subpop_eligible == 1), "\n")
cat("=========================================================\n")
```

```{r}
# --- 5. PRINT PHASE 2 COUNTS (MISSINGNESS EXCLUSIONS) ---
cat("=========================================================\n")
cat("      PHASE 2: MISSINGNESS EXCLUSION COUNTS             \n")
cat("=========================================================\n")

# Starting point for Phase 2 (Target Eligible Sample from Step 4)
cat("Baseline Eligible Sample (subpop_eligible): ", sum(nhanes_clean$subpop_eligible == 1), "\n\n")

#  Missing DEXA BMD Scan Data
cat("Excluded: Missing valid DEXA scan (DXDSTBMD):  -", sum(nhanes_clean$subpop_eligible == 1 & nhanes_clean$flag_valid_dexa == 0), "\n")
cat("  Sample with Valid DEXA (subpop):              ", sum(nhanes_clean$subpop == 1), "\n\n")

# Missing Height
cat("Excluded: Missing standing height (BMXHT):    -", sum(nhanes_clean$flag_valid_dexa == 1 & nhanes_clean$flag_valid_height == 0), "\n")
cat("  Remaining Sample:                             ", sum(nhanes_clean$flag_valid_height == 1), "\n\n")

#  Missing Screen Time
cat("Excluded: Missing screen time (TV/computer):   -", sum(nhanes_clean$flag_valid_dexa == 1 & nhanes_clean$flag_valid_screen == 0), "\n")
cat("  Remaining Sample:                             ", sum(nhanes_clean$flag_valid_screen == 1), "\n\n")

# Missing Food Security
cat("Excluded: Missing food security (FSDCH):       -", sum(nhanes_clean$flag_valid_screen == 1 & nhanes_clean$flag_valid_fsq == 0), "\n")
cat("  Remaining Sample:                             ", sum(nhanes_clean$flag_valid_fsq == 1), "\n\n")

# Missing Race / Ethnicity
cat("Excluded: Missing race/ethnicity (RIDRETH3):   -", sum(nhanes_clean$flag_valid_fsq == 1 & nhanes_clean$flag_valid_race == 0), "\n")
cat("  Remaining Sample:                             ", sum(nhanes_clean$flag_valid_race == 1), "\n\n")

# Missing Poverty-Income Ratio
cat("Excluded: Missing poverty-income ratio (PIR):  -", sum(nhanes_clean$flag_valid_race == 1 & nhanes_clean$flag_valid_pir == 0), "\n")
cat("  Remaining Sample:                             ", sum(nhanes_clean$flag_valid_pir == 1), "\n\n")

# Missing Parent Education
cat("Excluded: Missing parent education:            -", sum(nhanes_clean$flag_valid_pir == 1 & nhanes_clean$flag_valid_edu == 0), "\n")
cat("---------------------------------------------------------\n")

# Final Complete-Case Analytic Subpopulation (subpop1)
cat("FINAL COMPLETE-CASE SAMPLE (subpop1):          ", sum(nhanes_clean$subpop1 == 1), "\n")
cat("=========================================================\n")


# AFTER DEXA, Screen Time, Height, and Food Security are already validated (flag_valid_fsq == 1), this code gives counts for how many ppl are missing race/eth data, FPL data, and parent ed data
#race/eth
sum(nhanes_clean$flag_valid_fsq == 1 & 
    (is.na(nhanes_clean$RIDRETH3)))
#FPL
sum(nhanes_clean$flag_valid_fsq == 1 & 
    (is.na(nhanes_clean$INDFMPIR)))
#parent ed
sum(nhanes_clean$flag_valid_fsq == 1 & 
    (is.na(nhanes_clean$parent_edu)))
```

```{r}
# ---CALCULATE HEIGHT Z-SCORES (HAZ) ---
agemos <- nhanes_clean$RIDEXAGM + 0.5
nhanes_clean$haz <- NA_real_

# Convert factor sex to numeric integer (1 = Male, 2 = Female) so loop matches properly
sex_num <- as.numeric(nhanes_clean$RIAGENDR)

for (s in c(1, 2)) {
  m <- !is.na(sex_num) & sex_num == s
  ref <- statage[statage$sex == s, ]
  ref <- ref[order(ref$agemos), ]
  L <- approx(ref$agemos, ref$l, agemos[m], rule = 2)$y
  M <- approx(ref$agemos, ref$m, agemos[m], rule = 2)$y
  S <- approx(ref$agemos, ref$s, agemos[m], rule = 2)$y
  nhanes_clean$haz[m] <- lms_z(nhanes_clean$BMXHT[m], L, M, S)
}
```

```{r}
# --- 9. CALCULATE HEIGHT-ADJUSTED BMD Z-SCORES & SAVE ---
nhanes_clean <- nhanes_clean %>%
  mutate(sex = as.numeric(RIAGENDR)) %>%
  left_join(tblh_coefs, by = c("sex", "age_band")) %>%
  left_join(tblh_lms, by = c("sex", "age_band")) %>%
  mutate(
    predicted_z = intercept + slope * haz,
    observed_z = lms_z(DXDSTBMD, L, M, S),
    bmd_zscore_adj = observed_z - predicted_z
  )
```

```{r}
# Save master dataset locally
saveRDS(nhanes_clean, file = here("data", "processed", "nhanes_bmd_pediatric_master.rds"))
```
